name: Pacific Current Group Limited
analysis: PAC has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$10.8650. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$10.9014 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$10.8650, stop A$10.1673, target A$10.9800. Risk/reward is 0.16:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
